top_signals.title: CXMT Eyes China's Biggest IPO Since 2022 | The China Show 5/28/2026
top_signals.summary:
Bloomberg: The China Show is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy.  From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.
 (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: As Europe weighs less reliance on U.S. military, Asia doubles down
top_signals.summary: Tokyo, Seoul, Canberra and other capitals in the region believe U.S. military power is critical to counter the challenges from China and North Korea.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: OpenAI’s foundation to spend $250mn on research into AI’s impact on economy - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: OpenAI’s foundation to spend $250mn on research into AI’s impact on economy  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tiger Woods to miss all of golf’s majors in 2026
top_signals.summary: Woods is not eligible to compete at ‌the U.S. ‌Open next month, but he did ​have an exception to compete at the Open.
